failedAssertions.reason: Multi-scene state isolation broken: generationError is stored as component-level useState (WorldviewSection.tsx ~line 669) rather than per-scene in the Zustand store. When world generation fails in Scene A, the error persists globally and leaks into Scene B (and all other scenes). Scene B should show empty 'Create a 3D World' CTA but shows Scene A's error card instead. Fix: move generationError into per-scene state in the Zustand store, or reset generationError to null when activeSceneId changes.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Web Browser (agent-browser)' section with isolation rules, testing approach, store manipulation guidance, and error handling expectations
